arts.ttl: John Terry shows off training ahead of London Marathon attempt alongside former Chelsea team-mate - as he gets behind children's charity
arts.sum: The former Chelsea skipper posted a video on his Instagram showing his training prior to the event, which is set to take place April 27.

arts.ttl: Joao Felix clause, Chelsea's transfer decision and how it impacts FIFA Club World Cup plans
arts.sum: However, with Felix's loan at AC Milan not due to expire until June 30, the Portuguese attacker may not be back in time to feature for Chelsea in the competition. Chelsea may have to make do without Joao Felix for the Blues' FIFA Club World Cup campaign that gets underway on June 16 in the United States.

arts.ttl: Fifa Club World Cup ‘solidarity money’ figure revealed in bid to appease Chelsea and Man City rivals
arts.sum: $150m out of total $2bn prize pot earmarked for clubs not taking part, with concerns raised over the money’s potential to worsen inequality in the sport

arts.ttl: Wayne Bridge Recalls Shocking Moment Ex-Chelsea Star Knocked Out Teammate
arts.sum: Wayne Bridge recalled a brutal fight at Chelsea between Andriy Shevchenko and Tal ben Haim

arts.ttl: 'Has to play': Paul Merson urges Enzo Maresca to do one thing in Chelsea's match vs Copenhagen
arts.sum: Paul Merson has urged Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca to do one thing ahead of the upcoming European tie against Copenhagen. Chelsea are back in...

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Tottenham lead race to sign former Chelsea wonderkid
arts.sum: Tottenham are optimistic about securing the signing of Tyler Dibling, according to various reports. Tottenham favourites to sign Dibling

arts.ttl: Chelsea academy graduate in top form suffers season-ending injury, he helped his side to beat the Blues
arts.sum: Huge blow for Chelsea's Premier League rivals.

arts.ttl: Man Utd OUT, Chelsea IN: Liverpool face new threat for €50m superstar
arts.sum: Man Utd held a long-standing interest in the Hungary international, but Ben Jacobs reports that they are not expected to pursue a move for Kerkez given that they signed Patrick Dorgu in the January transfer window. The Bournemouth left-back has emerged as one of the Premier League's most sought-after prospects since joining the Cherries in 2023.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea deploy Joe Shields to beat Arsenal to £20m signing after Cole Palmer success
arts.sum: While Chelsea have certainly unearthed a few gems with their lavish spending in recent transfer windows, there have perhaps been no better additions than that...

arts.ttl: ‘DESPERATE’ Man Utd fighting off Chelsea bid as star demands ENORMOUS pay rise
arts.sum: With United set to be forced into summer sales in order to strengthen Ruben Amorim’s squad and comply with the Premier League’s Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR), Chelsea have been monitoring the situation of Alejandro Garnacho but also Kobbie Mainoo . United could be tempted to make a sale given that Mainoo’s transfer fee would be considered pure profit and will therefore count positively towards the club complying with PSR.
